object.name: cbnrm_annotation
object.property: <model xmlns:easyform="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/easyform" xmlns:form="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/form" xmlns:i18n="http://xml.zope.org/namespaces/i18n" xmlns:indexer="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/indexer" xmlns:lingua="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/lingua" xmlns:marshal="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/marshal" xmlns:security="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/security" xmlns:users="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/users" xmlns="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/schema"> <schema> <field name="annoResource" type="z3c.relationfield.schema.RelationChoice"> <description>This field should be pre-populated. Please do not change it.</description> <required>False</required> <title>Annotated resource</title> <portal_type> <element>File</element> </portal_type> </field> <field name="title" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <title>Annotation Title</title> </field> <field name="description" type="zope.schema.Text"> <description>Unique aspects of the document. Use and impact of NWP inputs. How useful was the document. How did it apply to NWP.</description> <required>False</required> <title>Annotation Detail (Summary)</title> </field> <field name="reviewer" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Reviewer</title> </field> <field name="reviewerAffil" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Reviewer Affiliation</title> </field> <field name="reviewDate" type="zope.schema.Date"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Review Date</title> </field> <field name="journal" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Journal</title> </field> <field name="publisher" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Publisher</title> </field> <field name="documentTypes" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Type(s) of document</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Journal article</element> <element>Project overview document/gray literature</element> <element>Project technical document (e.g. focusing on one or more aspects, such as technical approach, monitoring, application of a specific tool, etc)</element> <element>Book/chapter</element> <element>Site-based case study</element> <element>Country-based case study</element> <element>Regional case study</element> <element>Sectoral review</element> <element>Tool/methodology (e.g. legal analysis, value chain analysis, participatory methods, rapid assessment)</element> <element>Comparative analysis of cases or tools</element> <element>Meta-analysis of literature</element> <element>Evaluation</element> <element>Other - enter below</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="documentTypesOther" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Type(s) of document - other</title> </field> <field name="starRating" type="zope.schema.Choice"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Rating</title> <values> <element>★</element> <element>★★</element> <element>★★★</element> <element>★★★★</element> <element>★★★★★</element> </values> </field> <field name="regions" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Regions</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Africa</element> <element>Africa - Central</element> <element>Africa - East</element> <element>Africa - North</element> <element>Africa - Southern</element> <element>Africa - West</element> <element>Africa - Sahel</element> <element>Asia</element> <element>Asia - Central</element> <element>Asia - Indo-Pacific</element> <element>Asia - South</element> <element>Asia - Southeast</element> <element>Asia - Other Oceania</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean - Caribbean</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean - Central America</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean - Mexico</element> <element>Latin America and Caribbean - South America</element> <element>Middle East</element> <element>Eastern Europe</element> <element>Global</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="locationCountry" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Country</title> </field> <field name="locationState" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>State/Province</title> </field> <field name="locationCounty" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>County/District</title> </field> <field name="donor" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Donor</title> </field> <field name="projectName" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Project name</title> </field> <field name="naturalResources" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Natural resources</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Aquaculture</element> <element>Agriculture</element> <element>Biodiversity</element> <element>Coastal Zone</element> <element>Coral Reefs</element> <element>Field Crops</element> <element>Fisheries</element> <element>Fodder</element> <element>Forest</element> <element>Groundwater</element> <element>Irrigation Water</element> <element>Livestock</element> <element>Mangroves</element> <element>Minerals</element> <element>NTFPs</element> <element>Rain Water</element> <element>Rangeland</element> <element>Sea grasses</element> <element>Soil Carbon</element> <element>Soil Erosion</element> <element>Soil Quality</element> <element>Surface Water</element> <element>Timber</element> <element>Tourism</element> <element>Wetlands</element> <element>Whole Landscape</element> <element>Whole Seascape</element> <element>Wildlife</element> <element>Other</element> <element>Other (Write In)</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="naturalResourcesOther" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Natural resources - other</title> </field> <field name="ecosysServices" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Ecosystem services</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Biodiversity</element> <element>Blue Carbon</element> <element>Forest Carbon</element> <element>Pest Management</element> <element>Pollination</element> <element>Storm Protection</element> <element>Watershed</element> <element>Other</element> <element>Other (Write In)</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="ecosysServicesOther" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Ecosystem services - other</title> </field> <field name="nwpNature" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>NWP Principles - Nature</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Improved information and knowledge management systems - [Relevant]</element> <element>Improved information and knowledge management systems - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Improved information and knowledge management systems - [Critical]</element> <element>Promoted local land use planning and appropriate resource tenure systems - [Relevant]</element> <element>Promoted local land use planning and appropriate resource tenure systems - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Promoted local land use planning and appropriate resource tenure systems - [Critical]</element> <element>Fostered innovation, social learning, and adaptive management - [Relevant]</element> <element>Fostered innovation, social learning, and adaptive management - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Fostered innovation, social learning, and adaptive management - [Critical]</element> <element>Built capacity and invested in human resources - [Relevant]</element> <element>Built capacity and invested in human resources - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Built capacity and invested in human resources - [Critical]</element> <element>Promoted cost effective technical advisory and intermediary services - [Relevant]</element> <element>Promoted cost effective technical advisory and intermediary services - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Promoted cost effective technical advisory and intermediary services - [Critical]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="nwpWealth" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>NWP Principles - Wealth</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Promoted or developed economic strategies for natural resource management - [Relevant]</element> <element>Promoted or developed economic strategies for natural resource management - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Promoted or developed economic strategies for natural resource management - [Critical]</element> <element>Strengthened markets and NRM market incentives - [Relevant]</element> <element>Strengthened markets and NRM market incentives - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Strengthened markets and NRM market incentives - [Critical]</element> <element>Invested in local organizations - [Relevant]</element> <element>Invested in local organizations - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Invested in local organizations - [Critical]</element> <element>Created a framework for better NRM choices - [Relevant]</element> <element>Created a framework for better NRM choices - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Created a framework for better NRM choices - [Critical]</element> <element>Assured that resource managers have access to NRM means and benefits - [Relevant]</element> <element>Assured that resource managers have access to NRM means and benefits - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Assured that resource managers have access to NRM means and benefits - [Critical]</element> <element>Proportional equivalence between benefits and costs - [Relevant]</element> <element>Proportional equivalence between benefits and costs - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Proportional equivalence between benefits and costs - [Critical]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="nwpPower" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>NWP Principles - Power</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Procedural rights for all people, especially vulnerable or marginalized groups - [Relevant]</element> <element>Procedural rights for all people, especially vulnerable or marginalized groups - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Procedural rights for all people, especially vulnerable or marginalized groups - [Critical]</element> <element>Local stakeholder input into public decisions and policy - [Relevant]</element> <element>Local stakeholder input into public decisions and policy - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Local stakeholder input into public decisions and policy - [Critical]</element> <element>Natural resource authority and functions distribution - [Relevant]</element> <element>Natural resource authority and functions distribution - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Natural resource authority and functions distribution - [Critical]</element> <element>Continuous and inclusive consultations - [Relevant]</element> <element>Continuous and inclusive consultations - [Accomplished]</element> <element>Continuous and inclusive consultations - [Critical]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="toolsUsed" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Tools used</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Participatory Planning</element> <element>Information/knowledge management technology</element> <element>Land use planning</element> <element>Land tenure securitization</element> <element>Tree tenure rights</element> <element>Payments for ecosystem services</element> <element>Value chain strengthening/conservation marketing</element> <element>Web-based marketing</element> <element>Farmer-to-farmer schools</element> <element>Resource user groups</element> <element>Devolution to local governments</element> <element>Devolution to communities</element> <element>Participatory processes for social change</element> <element>GIS/remote sensing</element> <element>Water harvesting</element> <element>Managed grazing</element> <element>Other</element> <element>Other (Write In)</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="toolsUsedOther" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description/> <required>False</required> <title>Tools used - other</title> </field> <field name="constraints" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Constraints</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Yes]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Gender]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Household]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Communal]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Yes]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Gender]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Household]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Communal]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Yes]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Gender]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Household]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Communal]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="solutions" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Solutions</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Yes]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Gender]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Household]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Communal]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Yes]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Gender]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Household]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Communal]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Yes]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Gender]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Household]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Communal]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="impacts" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Impacts</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Yes]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Gender]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Household]</element> <element>Environmental/productivity - [Communal]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Yes]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Gender]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Household]</element> <element>Economic/income generation - [Communal]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Yes]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Gender]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Household]</element> <element>Governance/empowerment - [Communal]</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="discTopics" type="zope.schema.Set"> <default/> <description>Check all that apply</description> <required>False</required> <title>Additional Discussion Topics</title> <value_type type="zope.schema.Choice"> <values> <element>Resources - [External or structural policies that influenced success or failure]</element> <element>Economic - [External or structural policies that influenced success or failure]</element> <element>Governance - [External or structural policies that influenced success or failure]</element> <element>Lessons learned (Success Story)</element> <element>Lessons learned (Cautionary Tale)</element> </values> </value_type> <form:widget type="z3c.form.browser.checkbox.CheckBoxFieldWidget"/> </field> <field name="source_uid" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <description>Item source UID (internal to CMS)</description> <required>False</required> <title>Source UID</title> </field> </schema> </model>
